rules: Use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter for all headings.
Uppercase and tracking-[0.2em] for overlines and category labels.
Headlines maximum text-5xl or text-6xl for hero to maintain premium look.
Avoid centering text indiscriminately; use structured left-alignment.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for containers.
layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid strategy for Gallery/Portfolio (asymmetrical shapes). 'Grid Borders / Technical Look' (1px borders on items) for features/products.

components_instructions.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Sticky z-50. Navigation must be visible on desktop (no hamburger menu unless on mobile).
components_instructions.hero: Dark background overlaid with hero_jacket image (use object-cover and bg-black/50 scrim). Massive Cabinet Grotesk heading: 'JAKET CUSTOM UNTUK CERITA DAN SOLIDARITAS'. Primary CTA in Gold (#D4AF37).
components_instructions.canvas_designer: Interactive Customizer section. Split layout: Left panel for Tools (Logo upload/drag, text input, colors). Right panel for Live Preview using blank_jacket_mockup image. Use Tailwind absolute positioning to overlay user inputs on the mockup.
components_instructions.products: Product grid. Flat surface cards bg-[#141414], border border-white/10. On Hover: border changes to Gold, slight upward shift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components_instructions.about: Bento grid layout combining storytelling text (handmade, local materials) and community/lifestyle imagery.
components_instructions.faq: Shadcn accordion component, styled with dark mode and 1px bottom borders (border-white/10). No background colors on accordion items.
components_instructions.contact: Integration section for WhatsApp Order CTA and Instagram. Use Phosphor Icons or React Icons.
components_instructions.footer: Massive padding py-24. Large 'DERIS' logo text (text-[10vw]). Contrast shift to slightly lighter surface or pure black if body is lighter.

interactions: Hover states: All interactive elements must explicitly change text/bg color on hover (e.g. hover:text-[#F5C34A]).
Images inside grids should have a slight scale effect on hover (hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500).
MUST use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements per the testing requirements.
